article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer define his trajectory.
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent industry figures and his distinctive sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his work with prominent names in the music industry, including DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
His production style is characterized by a fusion of moombahton and dancehall elements, resulting in a distinctive sound that has earned him a notable position within the electronic music scene.

In addition to his collaborative projects, Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This pack includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums, offering insight into the tools behind his productions.

His work is further contextualized by his associations with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, all of whom contribute to the evolving landscape of Latin electronic music.
